Description: A bright and clear daytime view of the Eiffel Tower from Trocadéro Gardens, with people relaxing around the fountains. I chose this place because it’s one of the most iconic landmarks in the world and offers a beautiful open view of Paris.
A dramatic view of Big Ben and the Palace of Westminster on a rainy day in London. I chose this place because it represents one of the most iconic historical and cultural landmarks in the UK.

A bright and colorful view of Santorini with its iconic white buildings and blue domes overlooking the Aegean Sea. I chose this place because of its breathtaking scenery and peaceful Mediterranean atmosphere.

A breathtaking view of the Swiss Alps with a turquoise lake and a hiker standing on a narrow mountain ridge. I chose this place because Switzerland offers some of the most stunning natural landscapes perfect for hiking and adventure.
A beautiful evening view of the Ortak?y Mosque glowing with warm lights beside the Bosphorus Bridge in Istanbul. I chose this place because it perfectly blends history, culture, and modern city life.

A stunning tropical view of Maldives with overwater bungalows, crystal-clear turquoise water, and palm trees under a bright sunny sky. I chose this place because it represents the perfect peaceful island escape.

A stunning view of the Pyramids of Giza during golden hour, with a camel rider crossing the desert. I chose this place because it’s one of the most iconic historical wonders in the world and represents ancient Egyptian civilization.

A stunning sunset view of Burj Khalifa rising above the glowing cityscape of Dubai. I chose this place because it represents modern architecture, luxury, and one of the most iconic skylines in the world.

A moody winter view of Saint Basil’s Cathedral and the Kremlin in Moscow, surrounded by bare trees and patches of snow. I chose this place because of its rich history and unique architecture that stands out even in cold winter weather.

A peaceful view of the Dome of the Rock in Jerusalem with flocks of pigeons surrounding the courtyard. I chose this place because it holds deep spiritual and historical significance and offers a serene atmosphere.
